Soil/Rock Description: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of subrounded decomposed granite, occasionally some red bricks. (FILL)
Subrounded Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with pale brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted, fine to coarse, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. With closely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow and occasionally narrow, rough planar, smooth, manganese coated and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10°-20°, 40°-50°.
